rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"@kody full committed only skill docs; the actual implementation files (src/middleware/rateLimit.ts, rateLimit.test.ts) were never created. A FAIL verdict means the required source files are absent.","scope":"kody pipeline"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When a pipeline stage ends in FAIL, the agent must examine the actual diff (not assumptions) to determine whether required source files were written — build stages that pass on skill-doc-only commits ","scope":"kody pipeline"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Source files that a task explicitly requires (e.g., src/middleware/rateLimit.ts) must exist in the repository; pipeline state/artifact updates alone do not satisfy task requirements.","scope":"src/middleware"}]}
